caption: The video begins with a static shot of the IIEA logo, featuring a blue square with yellow stars and the text "IIEA" along with the website "iiea.com" and the tagline "Sharing Ideas Shaping Policy." The scene then transitions to a panel discussion setting, where several individuals are seated at a table, likely participating in a formal event or conference organized by the Institute of International and European Affairs. The table is set with nameplates, microphones, and glasses, indicating a structured and professional environment. The background includes banners with the IIEA branding, reinforcing the context of the event. The lighting is bright, suggesting an indoor venue with ample natural light. The participants appear engaged, possibly discussing topics related to international and European affairs.
